name.zh: 过去 12 个月每位 HR 员工平均学习天数的百分比变化 (新冠疫情前后)

formula: ((Number of business entity employees - Total number of business entity employees (temporary, part-time, and full-time)  12 months ago (pre-Covid)) / Total number of business entity employees (temporary, part-time, and full-time)  12 months ago (pre-Covid)) * 100

name.zh: 过去 12 个月业务实体员工数量的百分比变化 (新冠疫情前后)

formula: ((Number of HR FTEs (including contractors and outsourced resources) added/hired in the past 12 months - Number of HR FTEs (including contractors and outsourced resources) eliminated/redeployed in the past 12 months) / ((Number of FTEs who perform the function "develop and manage human capital" - Number of HR FTEs (including contractors and outsourced resources) added/hired in the past 12 months + Number of HR FTEs (including contractors and outsourced resources) eliminated/redeployed in the past 12 months)^2)^0.5) * 100

name.zh: 过去 12 个月 HR FTE 数量的百分比变化 (新冠疫情前后)

formula: ((Learning budget per HR employee - Learning budget per HR employee 12 months ago (pre-Covid) / Learning budget per HR employee 12 months ago (pre-Covid) * 100

name.zh: 过去 12 个月每位 HR 员工学习预算的百分比变化 (新冠疫情前后)

formula: ((Total number of furloughed employees - Total number of furloughed employees 12 months ago (pre-Covid)) / Total number of furloughed employees 12 months ago (pre-Covid)) * 100

name.zh: 过去 12 个月年度 HR 总成本的百分比变化
